description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch. Use two ubuntu-latest jobs: one for testing with a matrix of Python versions 3.7 through 3.12, and another for linting with Python 3.10. For testing, check out the code, install Poetry, set up Python with caching, install dependencies, run pytest, and upload coverage to Codecov for the 3.10 version. For linting, check out the code, set up Python 3.10, install dependencies, and run a lint check with Black.
